Message.title: Message
Message.description: A signaling message sent between users in a room.

type.description: The type of the message, e.g., 'TRACK_AVAILABLE', 'REQUEST_FULL_STATE', 'SYNC_STATE'.

payload.description: The message payload, containing data specific to the message type.

senderId.description: The unique ID of the sender.

senderRole.description: The role of the sender, e.g., 'admin', 'listener', 'teacher'.

timestamp.description: The time the message was sent.

rooms/{roomId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Messages sent within a specific room.
